title: Better Stone Crafting
description: Adds a variety of new ways to craft and recycle all types of stone blocks!
body:
With this data pack you can:

Recycle chiseled stones and stone bricks back into their original form by smelting them

Remove moss from cobblestone and stone bricks by smelting them

Craft gravel using 4 flint

Craft calcite using 2 cobblestone and 2 bone meal

Craft tuff using 2 cobbled deepslate and 2 quartz

Unpack quartz blocks back into quartz

Unpack magma blocks into magma cream

Craft crying obsidian, then turn it back into normal obsidian by smelting it

Craft blackstone with basalt and coal

Use pale moss to craft mossy stone bricks and cobble
